name: Ava Lawrence
learned: Ava Lawrence is a strong-willed woman who inherited her family's decaying mansion. She has spent years studying the mansion’s history and the curse that haunts it. She is adept at solving mysteries and is deeply committed to protecting her family legacy.
currently: Ava Lawrence is living at the Lawrence Estate, working tirelessly to uncover the secrets of the mansion and the curse that plagues her family. She is exploring every corner of the estate and its surrounding village, interviewing locals, and researching her family's dark past.
lifestyle: Ava follows a determined routine: waking up at 8am to explore the mansion and study historical records. She spends afternoons talking to locals and researching curse-related artifacts, taking breaks to document her findings. Her evenings are spent reflecting on the mystery of the curse and researching its origins.
